about.tagline: I’m Faisal Kabir Rabi, a motivated individual focused on growth, learning, and building a better future. I’m passionate about technology, self-development, and turning ideas into real work.
about.text: Based in Bangladesh, I am navigating the intersections of tradition and modernity. This archive serves as a digital vessel for my thoughts, visual explorations, and familial history. A lifelong student of architecture and human behavior.

gallery.title: Momentum
gallery.alt: A black and white street photography shot capturing motion and urban rhythm

gallery.title: Stillness
gallery.alt: A minimalist portrait emphasizing quiet emotion and soft lighting

gallery.title: Infinite
gallery.alt: Wide angle landscape shot showing a vast, open natural horizon

updates.title: Portfolio Launch
updates.desc:
Hi, I’m Faisal Kabir Rabi.
I’m passionate about learning, building, and improving every day.
I enjoy working with technology, exploring new ideas, and creating things that reflect who I am. My journey is all about growth, consistency, and becoming better than I was yesterday.

updates.title: Mountain Trip
updates.desc: Returned from an amazing trip to the mountains. Check out the Gallery for new photos!
